titleStmt.title: SII 31.187: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 187. (A.R. No. B 228 of 1936.) NĀYANIPĀLEM, VINUKONDA TALUK, GUNTUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Image set up on the tank-bund about a mile to the west of the village.

This epigraph is dated in the cyclic year Vīrōdhikṛīt, Kārttīka, śu. 12, Friday. This inscription may be assigned to the 13th century A.D. on the basis palaeography of the date of the record may be corresponded to 1491, A.D. October, 14.

It records the consecration of the image of Prōturāju by Chinayallappa, son of Gādēla Yallappa on the tank-bund of Yedluru. It also records that half a kumcha of land was given to the Kāsa who carved the image. From the date portion, which also refers to the subsquent day Saturday (marnāḍu sanivāramnāḍu) it appears that the grant was made on Saturday while the consecration took place on the previous day.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
virōthikṛt nā
masaṁvvatsara
kā¨rttika śu 12
śukravāraṁ nā
ḍu gākama[¨r*]nā
ḍu śanivāraṁ
nāḍu gādela
yallappa ko
māruḍu ci
ṁna mallappa
protu rā
junu ye
ḍlūri cē(ce)
ruvu mī
danu pra
tiṣṭa śeyi
cci niti
penu .
śē(śi)na kāśavāriki Arakuṁcaṁ māṁnyayiccenu .
Digital edition of SII 31.187 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
